name: Close Quarters
description: PASSIVE: Deal additional Weapon Damage when in close range to your target.

name: Extended Magazine
description: PASSIVE: Increases your magazine size and overall weapon damage.

name: Headshot Booster
description: PASSIVE: Your next headshot against an enemy Hero deals bonus weapon damage.

name: High-Velocity Rounds
description: PASSIVE: Increases bullet velocity and weapon damage.

name: Monster Rounds
description: PASSIVE: Grants bonus damage and resistance against non-player characters.

name: Rapid Rounds
description: PASSIVE: Increases your weapon fire rate.

name: Restorative Shot
description: PASSIVE: Your next bullet will heal you based on what target you hit.

name: Active Reload
description: ACTIVE: While reloading, pressing Reload button during the highlighted portion will instantly finish your reload and grant you Fire Rate, Bullet Lifesteal and Move Speed.

name: Fleetfoot
description:
PASSIVE: Removes the Move Speed penalty while shooting.
ACTIVE: Activate to gain bonus Move Speed and Slow Resistance.

name: Intensifying Magazine
description: PASSIVE: Increases Weapon Damage as you continuously fire your weapon.

name: Kinetic Dash
description: PASSIVE: When you Dash-Jump you gain Fire Rate and bonus Ammo until your next reload. Lasts up to 7s.

name: Long Range
description: PASSIVE: Deal additional Weapon Damage when beyond a minimum distance from your target.

name: Melee Charge
description: PASSIVE: Your next Heavy Melee attack against an enemy deals increased damage.

name: Mystic Shot
description: PASSIVE: Your next bullet deals bonus Spirit Damage.

name: Swift Striker
description: PASSIVE: Increases fire rate and sprint speed.

name: Titanic Magazine
description: PASSIVE: Massively increases magazine size and weapon damage.

name: Weakening Headshot
description: PASSIVE: Landing a Headshot on Heroes reduces their Bullet Resist.

name: Opening Rounds
description: PASSIVE: Your attacks have additional Weapon Damage against enemies above 50% health.

name: Recharging Rush
description: PASSIVE: Dealing significant weapon damage replenishes a charge for each of your charged abilities.

name: Slowing Bullets
description: PASSIVE: Your bullets build up a Movement Slow on enemies.

name: Spirit Shredder Bullets
description: PASSIVE: Your bullets apply a debuff that reduces the Spirit Resist of the target and grants you and your allies Spirit Lifesteal against them.

name: Split Shot
description: ACTIVE: Make your weapon fire multishot. Hitting more than one Hero per attack will grant a stacking weapon damage bonus.

name: Stalker
description: PASSIVE: Dealing weapon damage at close range opens a wound and grants you bonus move speed. Wounded enemies take spirit damage over time, have reduced bullet resist, and are revealed through walls.

name: Alchemical Fire
description: ACTIVE: Throw a flask that explodes on contact, creating an area that does increasing Spirit Damage per second and reduces enemy Bullet Resist. 50% less effective vs non-heroes.

name: Ballistic Enchantment
description: PASSIVE: Imbue an ability with increased range. Dealing damage with that ability grants you increased weapon damage per unique hero hit. Has reduced effect on non-heroes.

name: Berserker
description: PASSIVE: Your Weapon Damage increases as you take sustained damage.

name: Blood Tribute
description: ACTIVE: Toggle: Continually sacrifice Health to improve fire rate, Debuff Resistance and Move Speed.

name: Burst Fire
description: PASSIVE: Briefly gain Fire Rate and Move Speed when one of your bullets hits an enemy hero.

name: Cultist Sacrifice
description: ACTIVE: Target an enemy NPC and consume it for 150% Bonus Souls and grants a powerful long lasting buff.

name: Escalating Resilience
description: PASSIVE: Grants Bullet Resist when your bullets hit an enemy hero. Each shot can only grant one stack.

name: Express Shot
description: PASSIVE: Your next attack will fire twice in quick succession with increased damage and velocity. This attack consumes extra ammo.

name: Headhunter
description: PASSIVE: Your next headshot against an enemy Hero deals bonus weapon damage, heals you, and briefly grants bonus move speed.

name: Heroic Aura
description:
PASSIVE: Provides Bullet Resist to nearby friendly units.
ACTIVE: Provides move speed and fire rate to you and nearby allies. Minions get double value.

name: Hollow Point
description: PASSIVE: When you are above 65% health, deal additional Weapon Damage and your bullets reduce enemy Bullet Resist.

name: Hunter's Aura
description: PASSIVE: Reduces nearby enemies' Bullet Resist and Fire Rate. If there is only one enemy hero nearby, this effect is doubled.

name: Point Blank
description: PASSIVE: When in close range to your target, gain Weapon Damage and your bullets apply a Movement Slow.

name: Sharpshooter
description: PASSIVE: Deal additional Weapon Damage when beyond a minimum distance from your target.

name: Spirit Rend
description:
PASSIVE: Your bullets apply a debuff that reduces the Spirit Resist of the target and grants you and your allies Spirit Lifesteal against them.
PASSIVE: Landing headshots against the target reduces their Spirit Resist further.

name: Tesla Bullets
description: PASSIVE: Your bullets have a chance to shock your target. The shock will jump to a nearby enemy.

name: Toxic Bullets
description: PASSIVE: Your bullets build up a Bleed on enemies, causing them to lose a percentage of their Max Health over time. Also applies Healing Reduction on the bleeding target.

name: Weighted Shots
description: PASSIVE: Your bullets build up a Movement Slow on enemies.

name: Armor Piercing Rounds
description: PASSIVE: Your Bullets have a chance to become unavoidable, piercing through enemies and ignoring their Bullet Resistance.

name: Capacitor
description:
PASSIVE: Your bullets have a chance to shock your target. The shock will jump to a nearby enemy.
ACTIVE: Launch a projectile that deals damage, applies a strong slow that recovers over time, prevents Stamina usage and Silences their movement-based items and abilities.

name: Crippling Headshot
description: PASSIVE: Landing a Headshot on Heroes will reduce their Bullet and Spirit Resist and applies Healing Reduction.

name: Crushing Fists
description:
PASSIVE: Your next Heavy Melee attack against an enemy deals increased damage.
PASSIVE: Your melee damage will restore ammo and apply a stacking bullet resist debuff on enemies. Heavy melee applies 2 stacks. If the target reaches max stacks, they will be stunned.

name: Frenzy
description: PASSIVE: While you are below 50% health, you gain stat bonuses.

name: Glass Cannon
description: PASSIVE: Each hero kill grants permanent Fire Rate (up to a max of 8 times). Death results in the loss of 1 stack.

name: Lucky Shot
description: PASSIVE: Your bullets have a chance to be empowered, causing them to deal bonus weapon damage on hit. Bonus damage cannot Crit.

name: Ricochet
description: PASSIVE: Your bullets will ricochet on enemies near your target, applying any bullet procs and dealing a percentage of the original damage.

name: Shadow Weave
description: ACTIVE: Become Stealthed. Whenever you take damage while Stealthed you get briefly revealed. Attacking or using an ability will end your stealth and start an ambush, temporarily granting you bonus Fire Rate, Spirit Power and Melee Damage.

name: Silencer
description:
PASSIVE: Your bullets reduce the target's outgoing spirit damage.
PASSIVE: Your bullets build up to a Silence. Victims are immune to the build up for 10s after silence expires.

name: Spellslinger
description: PASSIVE: While in-combat whenever you cast an ability or item, gain a stacking buff that improves fire rate and reload speed. Each stack refreshes the duration.

name: Spiritual Overflow
description: PASSIVE: Gain bonus Fire Rate, Spirit Power and Ability Duration by charging up when shooting enemy heroes.

name: Extra Health
description: PASSIVE: Increases your maximum health.

name: Extra Regen
description: PASSIVE: Increases your health regeneration.

name: Extra Stamina
description: PASSIVE: Increases your stamina and stamina recovery.

name: Healing Rite
description: ACTIVE: Grant Regen and Sprint Speed to the target. Gets dispelled if you take damage from enemy players or objectives. Can be self-cast.

name: Melee Lifesteal
description: PASSIVE: Your next Melee attack heals you. This heal is 30% effective vs non-heroes. Cooldown is 1.5x as long for Light Melee hits.

name: Rebuttal
description: PASSIVE: On a successful Parry against an enemy Hero, Heal yourself for the damage parried and returns that damage to the target, and temporarily gain increased damage.

name: Sprint Boots
description: PASSIVE: Increases your sprint speed and out of combat regeneration.

name: Battle Vest
description: PASSIVE: While you are above 65% health, gain weapon damage and bonus fire rate.

name: Bullet Lifesteal
description: PASSIVE: Heals you based on weapon damage dealt.

name: Debuff Reducer
description: PASSIVE: Reduces the duration of all negative effects applied to you.

name: Enchanter's Emblem
description: PASSIVE: While you are above 65% health, gain bonus Spirit and Cooldown Reduction.

name: Enduring Speed
description: PASSIVE: Reduces the effect of enemy Move Speed penalties.

name: Guardian Ward
description: ACTIVE: Provide the target with a Barrier and temporary Move Speed. Can be self-cast. Cooldown is reduced by half when cast on someone else.

name: Healbane
description: PASSIVE: Your Spirit Damage applies Healing Reduction. If an enemy hero dies under this effect, you receive a large heal.

name: Healing Booster
description: PASSIVE: Increases the effectiveness of your healing.

name: Reactive Barrier
description: PASSIVE: Automatically restores one stamina and gain a Barrier when you are movement locked, Stunned, Chained, Immobilized, or Slept.

name: Restorative Locket
description: ACTIVE: When an enemy uses an ability within 35m range from you, store one Restoration Stack. Consume all stacks to heal yourself and replenish up to 4 stamina based on how many stacks you have.

name: Return Fire
description: ACTIVE: Automatically fire a bullet towards any attacker who damages you with their abilities or weapon.

name: Spirit Lifesteal
description: PASSIVE: Heals you based on spirit damage dealt.

name: Spirit Shielding
description: PASSIVE: Gain a Barrier whenever you take significant spirit damage from enemy Heroes in a small time frame.

name: Weapon Shielding
description: PASSIVE: Gain a Barrier whenever you take significant weapon damage from enemy Heroes in a small time frame.

name: Bullet Resilience
description: PASSIVE: When below 50% health, gain additional Bullet Resist.

name: Counterspell
description: PASSIVE: Your next parry protects you from the damage and effects of enemy abilities and items. On a successful spell parry, heal and gain move speed and Spirit.

name: Dispel Magic
description: ACTIVE: Purge all non-ultimate negative effects currently applied to you. If any effects were removed, heal yourself and gain a move speed bonus. Cannot be used while Stunned or Slept.

name: Fortitude
description: PASSIVE: After not taking damage for a period, gain health regen. When you are above 75% health, you have bonus Move Speed.

name: Fury Trance
description: ACTIVE: Grants Fire Rate and Spirit Resistance but Silences you and disables stamina usage and regeneration.

name: Healing Nova
description: ACTIVE: Heal yourself and nearby allies.

name: Lifestrike
description: PASSIVE: Your Melee Attack applies Movement Slow and heals you for a percentage of the Melee Damage dealt plus a fixed amount. This heal is 40% effective vs non-heroes. Cooldown is 1.5x as long for Light Melee hits.

name: Majestic Leap
description: ACTIVE: Launch yourself high into the air and grant yourself a Barrier. While in the air, you can use the active again to drop down faster. Cannot be used for 5s if attacked by enemy Hero.

name: Metal Skin
description: ACTIVE: Become immune to bullets.

name: Rescue Beam
description: ACTIVE: Heals a target allied hero and yourself for a percentage of Max Health. Once while healing, you can Pull the target towards you. Can be self-cast.

name: Spirit Resilience
description: PASSIVE: When below 50% health, gain additional Spirit Resist.

name: Stamina Mastery
description: PASSIVE: Allows an additional use of Air Jump or Air Dash before landing.

name: Trophy Collector
description: PASSIVE: Whenever you score an assist or kill, gain extra health, sprint, ability range and passive soul generation. This effect stacks and persists through death.

name: Veil Walker
description: PASSIVE: Walking through a cosmic veil grants you Stealth, Heal and increased Move Speed.

name: Warp Stone
description: ACTIVE: Teleport straight ahead, gaining Bullet Resist.

name: Cheat Death
description: PASSIVE: When you would take lethal damage, instead become temporarily death immune and remove all non-stun debuffs. While death immune, you deal reduced damage and have reduced healing.

name: Colossus
description: ACTIVE: Grow larger in size, gaining bullet resist, spirit resist, and melee damage. Nearby enemies suffer from slow and have reduced dash speed.

name: Divine Barrier
description: ACTIVE: Remove all non-stun debuffs from the target and provide them with a Barrier and Move Speed. Can be self-cast. Cooldown is reduced by half when cast on someone else.

name: Diviner's Kevlar
description: PASSIVE: Upon casting an ultimate ability gain a Barrier and temporary Spirit Power.

name: Healing Tempo
description: PASSIVE: Applying heal to yourself or an ally grants the target bonus fire rate and bonus move speed. Does not apply on innate Regen or passive Bullet/Spirit Lifesteals.

name: Infuser
description: ACTIVE: Gain Spirit Lifesteal and Spirit Power.

name: Inhibitor
description: PASSIVE: Your bullets build up to reduce the target's outgoing damage and apply healing reduction.

name: Juggernaut
description: PASSIVE: Enemies that shoot you have their Fire Rate slowed.

name: Leech
description: PASSIVE: Heals you based on both weapon and spirit damage dealt.

name: Phantom Strike
description: ACTIVE: Teleport to an enemy target and pull them to the ground. Dealing damage, Move speed reduction and Disarm.

name: Plated Armor
description: PASSIVE: Gain a chance to either deflect incoming bullets, preventing all weapon damage or prevent all on-hit effects from bullets.

name: Siphon Bullets
description: PASSIVE: Your bullets temporarily steal Max HP from enemies. Enemies regain their stolen health when the debuff expires.

name: Spellbreaker
description: PASSIVE: The next instance of high spirit damage you take is significantly reduced.

name: Unstoppable
description: ACTIVE: Temporarily suppress negative status effects and become immune to Stun, Silence, Sleep, Root, and Disarm. Cannot be used while Stunned or Slept.

name: Vampiric Burst
description: ACTIVE: Grants Lifesteal, Fire Rate, and Ammo. This added Ammo is not limited by your max magazine size.

name: Witchmail
description: PASSIVE: Taking heavy hits of spirit damage from an enemy reduces a random ability cooldown.

name: Extra Charge
stats: +7 Bonus Spirit Power for Charged Abilities
description: PASSIVE: Grants an additional charge to your abilities.

name: Extra Spirit
description: PASSIVE: Increases your Spirit Power.

name: Golden Goose Egg
description: ACTIVE: Hatch the egg, gaining souls and permanent buffs. The value of the egg grows the longer you hold onto it. Gain a permanent buff per 150 Souls stored when hatched.

name: Mystic Burst
description: PASSIVE: Charges up over time with bonus spirit damage, causing abilities dealing more than 80 damage to deal additional damage.

name: Mystic Expansion
description: PASSIVE: Imbue an ability to increase its range and effect radius.

name: Mystic Regeneration
description: PASSIVE: Dealing Spirit Damage to enemy Heroes grants you Bonus Health Regen. Stacks when dealing damage to different heroes.

name: Rusted Barrel
description: ACTIVE: Target an enemy to reduce their Fire Rate and Bullet Resistance.

name: Spirit Strike
description: PASSIVE: When you perform a Light or Heavy Melee attack against a hero, deal extra Spirit Damage with the attack and reduce the target's Spirit Resist. Cooldown is 2x longer for Light Melee hits.

name: Arcane Surge
description: PASSIVE: When you Dash-Jump the next ability you use will have bonus Range, Duration, and Spirit Power. Lasts up to 7s.

name: Bullet Resist Shredder
description: PASSIVE: Reduces Bullet Resist on enemies when you deal Spirit Damage.

name: Cold Front
description: ACTIVE: Release an expanding ice blast that deals Spirit Damage and Slows targets it hits.

name: Compress Cooldown
description: PASSIVE: Imbue an ability to reduce its Cooldown.

name: Duration Extender
description: PASSIVE: Imbue an ability to increase its Duration.

name: Improved Spirit
description: PASSIVE: Increases your Spirit Power and out of combat regeneration.

name: Mystic Slow
description: PASSIVE: When the target takes Spirit Damage, they have their Move Speed reduced.

name: Mystic Vulnerability
description: PASSIVE: When an enemy takes Spirit Damage, they have their Spirit Resist reduced.

name: Quicksilver Reload
description: PASSIVE: Your imbued ability charges up over time with bonus spirit damage, bonus fire rate, and reloads bullets on use.

name: Slowing Hex
description: ACTIVE: Slows movement of enemy target. Also Silences their movement-based items and abilities. Increases the target's gravity. Does not affect target's stamina usage.

name: Spirit Sap
description: ACTIVE: Target an enemy to reduce their Spirit Resist and Spirit Power.

name: Suppressor
description: PASSIVE: When you deal Spirit Damage to enemies, you also reduce their Fire Rate.

name: Decay
description: ACTIVE: Inflict damage over time to a target, dealing damage based on their current health. Decay's damage is non-lethal and does not apply item procs.

name: Disarming Hex
description: ACTIVE: Disarms enemy target and reduces their Bullet Resist.

name: Greater Expansion
description: PASSIVE: Increases the range and effect radius of your abilities and items.

name: Knockdown
description: ACTIVE: Apply a Stun after 2s. Stun duration is increased against airborne targets. Increases the target's gravity for the duration of the stun.

name: Radiant Regeneration
description:
PASSIVE: Dealing Spirit Damage to enemy Heroes grants you Bonus Health Regen. Stacks when dealing damage to different heroes.
PASSIVE: Heal and gain bonus Movement Speed for a short duration when you cast an ability.

name: Rapid Recharge
stats: +10 Bonus Spirit Power for Charged Abilities
description: PASSIVE: Grants additional ability charges, faster charge recovery, cooldown reduction and bonus Spirit Power for charged abilities.

name: Silence Wave
description: ACTIVE: Launch an expanding projectile which Silences enemies for a short duration and deals impact damage. Silence does not interrupt channeling abilities.

name: Spirit Snatch
description: PASSIVE: When you perform a Light or Heavy Melee attack against a hero, the attack deals extra Spirit Damage and steals Spirit Resist and Spirit Power. Effects are reduced to 70% for Light Melee hits.

name: Superior Cooldown
description: PASSIVE: Reduces the Cooldown of your abilities.

name: Superior Duration
description: PASSIVE: Increases the duration of your abilities and items.

name: Surge of Power
description: PASSIVE: Imbue an ability with permanent Spirit Power. When that ability is used, gain bonus Move Speed and maintain full speed while attacking.

name: Tankbuster
description: PASSIVE: Charges up over time with bonus spirit damage, causing abilities dealing more than 165 damage to deal additional damage. Ignores Spirit Resistance.

name: Torment Pulse
description: PASSIVE: Periodically deals Spirit Damage to the closest two enemies nearby.

name: Arctic Blast
description: ACTIVE: Release an expanding ice blast that deals Spirit Damage, Freezing and then Slowing targets it hits. Targets take increased damage while frozen.

name: Boundless Spirit
description: PASSIVE: Greatly increases your Spirit Power.

name: Cursed Relic
description: ACTIVE: Curses an enemy - interrupting, Silencing, Disarming, and preventing item usage. Removes all non-ultimate buffs.

name: Echo Shard
description: ACTIVE: Reset the cooldown of the imbued non-ultimate ability.

name: Escalating Exposure
description: PASSIVE: Dealing Spirit Damage applies a stacking Spirit Amp that increases your Spirit Damage to the target.

name: Ethereal Shift
description: ACTIVE: You enter a void state and become untargetable and invincible for a short duration, during which you float slowly and cannot perform actions. Afterwards you gain Spirit Power, Move Speed, and Spirit Resist. Can be canceled early. Activation cancels any active ability.

name: Focus Lens
description: ACTIVE: Target an enemy to Silence them. A portion of all damage dealt during the silence gets applied to the target when the silence wears off.

name: Lightning Scroll
description: PASSIVE: Damage from your ultimate applies a stun and deals bonus spirit damage after a short delay. This effect can only trigger once per target per ultimate.

name: Magic Carpet
description: ACTIVE: Summon a Magic Carpet that will fly you away. While flying you are immune to slows and doing any action will dismiss the carpet. Cannot use abilities while the carpet is being summoned.

name: Mercurial Magnum
description: PASSIVE: Your imbued ability charges up over time with bonus spirit damage, bonus fire rate, and reloads bullets on use. Until your next reload, your bullets deal bonus Spirit Damage based on your Spirit Power.

name: Mystic Reverb
description: PASSIVE: Imbue an ability with Lifesteal and to apply slow on a hit target and deal an additional percentage of the damage dealt to enemies around the target after a short delay.

name: Refresher
description: ACTIVE: Reset the cooldown of all your abilities and restore all your charges.

name: Scourge
description: ACTIVE: Apply Spirit Resist and an aura on a friendly target that deals damage to enemies proportional to their max health. Can be self cast.

name: Spirit Burn
description: PASSIVE: Dealing significant Spirit Damage to an enemy within 5s causes an explosion dealing damage and a burn to nearby enemies. While burning, enemies take damage over time and receive reduced healing. Deals half-damage and has half-cooldown on non-heroes.

name: Transcendent Cooldown
description: PASSIVE: Reduces the Cooldown of your abilities and items.

name: Vortex Web
description: ACTIVE: Throw a vacuum grenade, pulling all enemies into a small area and applying Slowing Hex. Alt Cast to Target Unit Directly.
